channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Madhevere and Nyamhuri return for Zimbabwe’s T20I series against India
item.description: CricInfo Tafadzwa Tsiga, the wicketkeeper-batter, has earned his first T20I call-up, while batting allrounder Wessly Madhevere and fast bowler Newman Nyamhuri have been drafted in for Zimbabwe’s three-match T20I series at home against India. The trio has replaced Clive Madande, T #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: PSL giants avoid each other in Munhumutapa Challenge Cup Round of 32 draw
item.description: Zimbabwe Premier Soccer League heavyweights have avoided facing each other in the Round of 32 of the inaugural ZIFA Munhumutapa Challenge Cup following Wednesday’s draw. The upcoming round will be played on the weekend of 7 to 9 August across the country. Bulawayo giants Highland #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Shadowy group calls for cancellation of August concerts ahead of planned anti-CAA3 demonstrations
item.description: A shadowy organisation representing migrants has called on promoters to cancel all music concerts scheduled for August, including highly anticipated shows by Winky D and Jah Prayzah, claiming the events could clash with planned anti-government demonstrations. Calls for protests against the recently enacted Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Act have gained traction on social [...] The post Shadowy group calls for cancellation of August concerts ahead of planned anti-CAA3 demonstrations appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: When Period Pain is Normalised: The Hidden Endometriosis Crisis
item.description: When Pain is Normalised: Inside the Hidden Endometriosis Crisis For generations, Black women have been taught to bear severe pelvic pain with quiet dignity, dismissing debilitating cycles as a normal rite of passage. But what happens when \"normal period pain\" is actually a chroni #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Pan-African Parliament begins 7th Parliament session as lawmakers tackle water, trade and governance
item.description: THE First Committee Sittings and Ordinary Session of the Seventh Parliament of the Pan-African Parliament (PAP) are underway in Midrand, South Africa, ahead of the official opening ceremony scheduled for July 27. Permanent Committees have already begun deliberations, with parliamentarians from across Africa meeting to consider key legislative and policy issues before the plenary session. [...] The post Pan-African Parliament begins 7th Parliament session as lawmakers tackle water, trade and governance appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: OPINION | Why Section 328(7) Can’t Stop Mnangagwa from Benefiting Under Amendment No. 3
item.description: By Lucky Ndlovu For months, a loud chorus of politicians, activists, lawyers, and self-appointed constitutional experts has repeated the same claim that Constitution Amendment Act No. 3 (CA3) of 2026 cannot benefit President Emmerson Mnangagwa because of Section 328(7) of the Constitution. The claim has been repeated so often that many now accept it as [...] The post OPINION | Why Section 328(7) Can’t Stop Mnangagwa from Benefiting Under Amendment No. 3 appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Angry mother-in-law orders vakwasha to go back: Bitter fight over Nothabo Zandile Khumalo’s burial process
item.description: BLOOD AND BETRAYAL: THE BITTER BURIAL BATTLE OVER THE UK TRIPLE MURDER BULAWAYO – In the quiet, dusty streets of Gwabalanda, a high-density suburb in Bulawayo, the air is thick with a grief so profound it has curdled into a cold, hard resolve. Behind the gates of the Khumalo family home, a tragedy that began [...] The post Angry mother-in-law orders vakwasha to go back: Bitter fight over Nothabo Zandile Khumalo’s burial process first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Panic over July 31 ‘Planned Protests’: Why Senior Officials are Afraid... CIOs are Working Overtime @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: The July 31 Panic: Why the Ruling Elite is Terrified of a Ghost from the 2020 Protests HARARE – As 31 July draws to a close, a palpable sense of paranoia has gripped the upper echelons of Zimbabwe’s ruling Zanu PF party. Top brass have sounded a frantic alarm over “planned protests” set for July [...] The post Panic over July 31 ‘Planned Protests’: Why Senior Officials are Afraid... CIOs are Working Overtime first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chamisa to Meet Zimbabweans in UK on Diaspora Listening Tour @263Chat @nelsonchamisa
item.description: Former Citizens Coalition for Change (CCC) leader Nelson Chamisa has announced a two-day consultation tour of the United Kingdom saying he wants to engage Zimbabweans living abroad on the country’s future and the role of the diaspora in national development. Chamisa said he would meet [...] The post Chamisa to Meet Zimbabweans in UK on Diaspora Listening Tour appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: ZYC Tightens Registration Rules, Launches Diaspora Drive @263Chat
item.description: By Meshia Mambo The Zimbabwe Youth Council (ZYC) has unveiled a raft of reforms aimed at strengthening youth representation, improving accountability and tapping into the expertise of Zimbabweans living abroad. Speaking at a stakeholder luncheon held at the Council’s head offices ZYC Board Chairperson Rutendo [...] The post ZYC Tightens Registration Rules, Launches Diaspora Drive appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Feli Nandi Launches Fan Ticket Promotions Ahead of Historic HICC Live Recording
item.description: Gateway Stream Media and the Feli Nandi brand have unveiled a series of exciting ticket promotions aimed at giving more Zimbabweans the opportunity to attend A Night with Feli Nandi Vol. 9, the singer’s landmark live recording concert set for 14 August 2026 at the Harare International Convention Centre (HICC). Under the theme ‘A [...] The post Feli Nandi Launches Fan Ticket Promotions Ahead of Historic HICC Live Recording appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: The Gift Banda Betrayal: Why the CCC Heavyweight Traded His Soul for a Seat at the Zanu PF Table @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: A Political Earthquake in Matabeleland The political landscape of Matabeleland has been irrevocably altered by the recent defection of Gift Banda, a former Bulawayo deputy mayor and a once-stalwart figure of the Citizens Coalition for Change (CCC), to the ruling Zanu PF. His dramatic switch, announced at a high-profile rally in Gwanda, Matabeleland South, has [...] The post The Gift Banda Betrayal: Why the CCC Heavyweight Traded His Soul for a Seat at the Zanu PF Table first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Econet Unveils XtraData Bundles as Competition for Mobile Data Customers Intensifies @econetzimbabwe
item.description: HARARE – Econet Wireless Zimbabwe has introduced a new mobile data product that effectively doubles customers’ data allocations through promotional bonus bundles, as the country’s largest mobile network operator intensifies efforts to deliver greater value in an increasingly data-driven market. According to newZWire, the newly launched XtraData Bundles combine a purchased data bundle with a [...] The post Econet Unveils XtraData Bundles as Competition for Mobile Data Customers Intensifies appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Residents’ Body Urges Govt to Extend Deceased Estates Deadline @263Chat
item.description: The Zimbabwe Union of Residents and Ratepayers Association (ZURRA) has urged the Government to extend the deadline for finalising deceased estates warning that thousands of vulnerable families could struggle to comply because of the high cost of estate administration. The call follows a public notice [...] The post Residents’ Body Urges Govt to Extend Deceased Estates Deadline appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Machakaire Defends Second Republic As Young People Drown In Unemployment @ZANUPF_Official
